summary.note: Total cost to take one SSR+ unit from base all the way to Opal 5★.

source: Twilight Chronicles: Idle RPG community Discord — "Character Star Up Guide" by @reyy. Per-band duplicate counts cross-checked (2+2+3+10 = 17 + 1 base = 18).
fodderNote: Fodder must match the hero's own faction, except the lines marked "any faction".
tips: Spread resources across your team — don't dump everything into one unit, whether levels or stars.
Anima is the most expensive tier to promote out of; plan fodder before starting it.
Opal costs 10 duplicates of the unit itself — the late-game wall.
